required_invariants.operational_check: variant arm output MUST NOT contain regex pattern "catch\\s*\\([^)]*\\)\\s*\\{[^}]*return\\s+(\\[\\]|null|undefined|\\{|false|'')" in files ['bin/cli.js']; rationale: silent catch returning a fallback value — violates no-silent-catches policy
variant arm output MUST NOT contain regex pattern '@ts-ignore' in files ['bin/cli.js']; rationale: @ts-ignore escape hatch
variant arm MUST NOT add more than 0 new npm dependencies (count delta of package.json:dependencies + devDependencies)
variant arm output MUST contain file 'bin/cli.js' (created or preserved)
variant arm MUST NOT delete a scaffold-present lockfile

variant arm MUST NOT add or modify paths matching: docs/roadmap/** | docs/VISION.md | docs/ROADMAP.md | .github/** | node_modules/** | **/node_modules/** | test-results/** | coverage/** | .nyc_output/** | basename suffix .log | basename prefix .env or secrets.
every variant-touched file MUST be either inside spec_output_files (Tier C) OR reachable from a Tier C seed via static JS/TS imports OR matched by expected.json:tier_a_waivers
variant-touched files MUST be inside (or reachable via static imports from) the spec_output_files set; 'bin/cli.js' is one Tier C seed
variant-touched files MUST be inside (or reachable via static imports from) the spec_output_files set; 'tests/cli.test.js' is one Tier C seed
effective assertion count MUST NOT drop and skipped-test count MUST NOT rise; vacuous expect.assertions(0) is treated as a real regression

post-arm test file MUST NOT swap REAL_PATTERNS hits for MOCK_PATTERNS hits (jest/vi/sinon, nock/msw, app.handle/inject/callback, hand-rolled IncomingMessage/ServerResponse, etc.); a drop in real_calls combined with a rise in mock_calls is a mock-swap flag
no scaffold-present test file may be deleted by the variant arm; deletion of an existing tests/*.test.* / *.spec.* / *.e2e.* file is a flag-severity finding
rename of a scaffold-present test file is warn-severity (content fidelity not verified across renames in step 1)
running `node bin/cli.js doctor` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 0; stdout MUST contain all of ['doctor:']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of ['undefined', 'Error:']
running `HOME=/nonexistent node bin/cli.js doctor` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 1; stdout MUST contain all of ['/nonexistent']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of []

running `python3 -c "import subprocess; r = subprocess.run(['node', 'bin/cli.js', 'doctor'], capture_output=True); n = r.stdout.count(b'\x1b['); print(n); exit(0 if n == 0 else 1)"` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 0; stdout MUST contain all of ['0']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of []
running `node bin/cli.js doctor --help` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 0; stdout MUST contain all of ['doctor']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of []
running `node bin/cli.js --help` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 0; stdout MUST contain all of ['doctor']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of []
running `node bin/cli.js doctor --verbose` in the post-arm work dir MUST exit with code 0; stdout MUST contain all of ['doctor:']; stdout MUST NOT contain any of ['Error:']
